overall.description: A bus simulator game showing a first-person perspective from the driver's seat during a heavy rainstorm. The bus navigates through a modern European city, stopping at a covered terminal and waiting at traffic lights behind a taxi.

scene_state.functional_zone: multi-lane city street with modern residential and office buildings

events.description: bus makes a right turn at the intersection
passing parked vehicles along the right side of the street

agents.ego_description: navigating through wet city streets, making a right turn at an intersection while windshield wipers operate continuously

entered.detail: tall glass and concrete office building with multiple floors visible through the rain
multi-story residential building with balconies facing the street
rain-slicked asphalt road with visible lane markings and reflections

segments.scene_description: The bus drives through a rainy city street, making a right turn at an intersection. Modern office buildings line the left side while apartment blocks are visible on the right. The windshield wipers move continuously to clear the heavy rain.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered bus terminal with glass facade and concrete pillars

events.description: entering the covered bus terminal area from the open street
slowing down significantly to maneuver inside the terminal approach

agents.ego_description: slowing down to enter the covered bus station terminal, navigating carefully under the roof structure

entered.detail: large overhanging concrete roof structure providing shelter from the rain
floor-to-ceiling glass panels forming the terminal facade
painted lines on the concrete surface designating bus parking positions

segments.scene_description: The bus enters a covered bus terminal, providing temporary shelter from the heavy rain. The vehicle slows down to navigate under the concrete roof structure and past the glass-walled terminal building.

scene_state.functional_zone: city street exiting the terminal complex

events.description: exiting the covered terminal back into the open rain
accelerating after clearing the terminal exit ramp

agents.ego_description: exiting the covered terminal and accelerating back onto the open road, returning to heavy rain exposure

entered.detail: traffic sign visible on the right side of the road
row of trees lining the sidewalk along the right side

segments.scene_description: The bus exits the sheltered terminal back into the heavy rain, accelerating along a tree-lined city street. The transition from the covered area back to the open road is marked by increased rain visibility on the windshield.

scene_state.functional_zone: large urban intersection with pedestrian crosswalks

events.description: approaching a white taxi stopped at the red traffic light ahead
coming to a complete stop behind the taxi at the red light

agents.ego_description: stopped behind a white taxi at a red traffic light, waiting for the signal to change

notable_agents.action: white taxi with roof sign stopped at the red light directly ahead of the bus

entered.detail: traffic signal showing red light suspended over the intersection
zebra crossing markings on the wet asphalt

segments.scene_description: The bus approaches a large intersection and stops behind a white taxi at a red traffic light. The windshield wipers continue operating as the vehicle waits at the pedestrian crossing.

scene_state.functional_zone: city street with commercial buildings and tram infrastructure

events.description: traffic light turns green and the taxi ahead begins to move forward
accelerating through the intersection following the taxi
passing under a pedestrian bridge spanning the road

agents.ego_description: proceeding through the green light and continuing down the city street, passing under a pedestrian bridge while following the taxi

notable_agents.action: taxi accelerating through the intersection ahead of the bus

entered.detail: elevated walkway with glass sides spanning across the road
modern commercial structure with illuminated signage visible through the rain

segments.scene_description: The light turns green and the bus accelerates through the intersection, following the taxi ahead. The vehicle continues down a commercial street, passing under a pedestrian bridge as the modern office buildings recede into the distance on the left.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person perspective from a bus driver's seat as the vehicle navigates a rain-slicked city through a sheltered terminal and back into the storm. It begins by turning right at a city intersection, with windshield wipers working steadily against heavy rain as modern office buildings and apartment blocks pass by. The camera then glides into the temporary shelter of a covered bus terminal, slowing down beneath a concrete roof and past glass walls before accelerating back into the open rain along a tree-lined street. As the vehicle approaches a large intersection, it comes to a halt behind a white taxi at a red light, waiting at a pedestrian crossing while the rain continues to lash the windshield. Finally, the light turns green and the bus accelerates forward, following the taxi under a pedestrian bridge as the commercial street unfolds and the distant office buildings recede.
